title: Smoky Poppy Seeds Tunisian Stir-fry
description: A dense and smoky post-workout dish featuring ground poppy seeds, fermented for depth of flavor, sugar-free-friendly to keep energy levels high.

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.amount: 1/2 teaspoon finely grated fresh or 1/2 teaspoon ground dried

instructions: In a small mixing bowl, combine poppy seeds with ground cumin and salt. Mix well.
Add minced garlic and finely grated ginger to the mixture. Mix until all ingredients are evenly combined.
Heat coconut oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add the poppy seed mixture and mix continuously for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly to prevent burning and ensure even cooking.
If desired, stir in tahini sauce for added richness. Continue to cook until the mixture turns golden brown and fragrant, about 1 minute more.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
